mapper.select: select PROJECT_NAME as name, DESCRIPTION as description, CREATE_TIME as createTime, CREATE_USER as createUser, OWNER as owner, MODIFY_TIME as modifyTime, MODIFY_USER as modifyUser, IS_AUTO as isAuto from M_PROJECT
mapper.insert:
insert into M_project (PROJECT_NAME, DESCRIPTION, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, OWNER, MODIFY_TIME, MODIFY_USER, IS_AUTO)
(select #{obj.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{obj.createTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #{obj.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{obj.modifyTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #{obj.modifyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.isAuto,jdbcType=NUMERIC} from dual)
mapper.update: update M_PROJECT set PROJECT_NAME = #{modelProject.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{modelProject.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = to_date(#{modelProject.createTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), CREATE_USER = #{modelProject.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OWNER = #{modelProject.owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MODIFY_TIME = to_date(#{modelProject.modifyTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), MODIFY_USER = #{modelProject.modifyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AUTO = #{modelProject.isAuto,jdbcType=NUMERIC} where PROJECT_NAME = #{modelProject.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select NODE_NAME as nodeName, NODE_DISPLAY_NAME as nodeDisplayName, CREATE_USER as createUser, CREATE_TIME as createTime, NODE_TYPE as nodeType, RUN_TYPE as runType, FILE_ID as fileId, FILE_VERSION as fileVersion, FILE_PATH as filePath, DESCRIPTION as description, PARA_VALUE as paraValue, START_EFFECT_DATE as startEffectDate, END_EFFECT_DATE as endEffectDate, CRON_EXPRESS as cronExpress, OWNER as owner, FLOW_NAME as flowName, PROJECT_NAME as projectName, DEPENDENT_TYPE as dependentType, SOURCE as source, CONNECTION as connection, MODIFY_TIME as modifyTime, MODIFY_USER as modifyUser, PRIORITY as priority, RESOURCE_GROUP_IDENTIFIER as resourceGroupIdentifier, BASE_LINE_ID as baselineId, CYCLE_TYPE as cycleType, DQC_DESCRIPTION as dqcDescription, DQC_TYPE as dqcType, IS_FLOW_TYPE as isFlowType from M_NODE
mapper.insert:
insert into M_NODE (NODE_NAME, NODE_DISPLAY_NAME, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, NODE_TYPE, RUN_TYPE, FILE_ID, FILE_VERSION, FILE_PATH, START_EFFECT_DATE, END_EFFECT_DATE, CRON_EXPRESS, OWNER, FLOW_NAME, PROJECT_NAME, DEPENDENT_TYPE, SOURCE, CONNECTION, MODIFY_TIME, MODIFY_USER, PRIORITY, RESOURCE_GROUP_IDENTIFIER, BASE_LINE_ID, CYCLE_TYPE, DQC_TYPE, IS_FLOW_TYPE )
(select #{obj.nodeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.nodeDisplayName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{obj.createTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #{obj.nodeType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.runType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.fileId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.fileVersion,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.filePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{obj.startEffectDate,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), to_date(#{obj.endEffectDate,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #{obj.cronExpress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.flowName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.dependentType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.connection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{obj.modifyTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #{obj.modifyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.priority,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.resourceGroupIdentifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.baselineId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.cycleType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.dqcType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.isFlowType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual)
mapper.select: select INSTANCE_ID as instanceId, PROJECT_NAME as projectName, NODE_NAME as nodeName, CREATE_TIME as createTime, STATUS as status from M_FLOW
mapper.insert:
insert into M_FLOW (HISTORY_ID, INSTANCE_ID, DAG_ID, INSTANCE_TYPE, DAG_TYPE, STATUS, OP_SEQ, OP_CODE, OWNER, BIZ_DATE, GMT_DATE, NODE_TYPE, PRIORITY, PARA_VALUE, PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_ID, RELATED_DAG_ID, FINISH_TIME, BEGIN_WAITTIME_TIME, BEGIN_WAITRES_TIME, BEGIN_RUN_TIME, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, MODIFY_TIME, MODIFY_USER, CYCLE_TYPE, CYCLE_TIME, DEPENDENT_TYPE, NODE_NAME, FLOW_NAME, IN_GROUP_ID, RESOURCE_GROUP_IDENTIFIER, BASE_LINE_ID )
(select #{obj.historyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.instanceId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.dagId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.instanceType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.dagType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.opSeq,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.opCode,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.owner,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, to_date(#{obj.bizdate,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), to_date(#{obj.gmtdate,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), #{obj.nodeType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.priority,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.paraValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.projectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.relatedDagId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, to_date(#{obj.finishTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), to_date(#{obj.beginWaitTimeTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), to_date(#{obj.beginWaitResTime,jdbcType=NUMERIC},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), to_date(#{obj.beginRunningTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), to_date(#{obj.createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), #{obj.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{obj.modifyTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), #{obj.modifyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.cycleType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, to_date(#{obj.cycleTime,jdbcType=NUMERIC},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), #{obj.dependentType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.nodeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.flowName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.inGroupId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{obj.resourceGroupIdentifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.baselineId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} from dual)
mapper.delete: delete from M_FLOW where node_name is not null and node_type =98
mapper.update: update M_FLOW set INSTANCE_ID = #{nodeInstance.instanceId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, STATUS = #{nodeInstance.status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BEGIN_WAITTIME_TIME = to_date(#{nodeInstance.beginWaitTimeTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), BEGIN_RUN_TIME = to_date(#{nodeInstance.beginRunningTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), BEGIN_WAITRES_TIME = to_date(#{nodeInstance.beginWaitResTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss'), FINISH_TIME = to_date(#{nodeInstance.finishTime,jdbcType=DATE},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi;ss') where PROJECT_NAME = #{nodeInstance.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and FLOW_NAME = #{nodeInstance.flowName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
